items.name: AppDslBuilder
items.doc:
Fluent builder for [`AppDsl`] — the validated shell configuration.

# Example
```rust,no_run
use slint_ui_templates::dsl::{AppDsl, Nav, Toolbar};
use slint_ui_templates::dsl::BgStyle;

let dsl = AppDsl::builder("My App")
    .nav(vec![
        Nav::new("home", "Home", "home"),
        Nav::new("settings", "Settings", "settings"),
    ])
    .toolbar(vec![Toolbar::new("add", "add", "New item")])
    .status("Ready")
    .bg_style(BgStyle::Mica)
    .window_size(1200, 800)
    .build()
    .unwrap();
```

items.name: new
items.signature: pub(crate) fn new(title: impl Into<String>) -> Self
items.doc: Create a new builder with the given window title.

items.name: platform
items.signature: pub fn platform(mut self, p: Platform) -> Self
items.doc: Set the target platform (affects nav-item limits and layout rules).

items.name: nav
items.signature: pub fn nav(mut self, items: Vec<Nav>) -> Self
items.doc: Set the sidebar navigation items (validated at `build()` time).

items.name: status
items.signature: pub fn status(mut self, text: impl Into<String>) -> Self
items.doc: Set the initial status-bar text (defaults to "Ready").

items.name: toolbar
items.signature: pub fn toolbar(mut self, items: Vec<Toolbar>) -> Self
items.doc: Set the toolbar icon buttons (validated at `build()` time).

items.name: window_size
items.signature: pub fn window_size(mut self, width: u32, height: u32) -> Self
items.doc: Set the initial window dimensions in logical pixels.

items.name: bg_style
items.signature: pub fn bg_style(mut self, style: super::BgStyle) -> Self
items.doc: Set OS-level window backdrop (Windows 11 only; no-op elsewhere).

items.name: views
items.signature: pub fn views(mut self, ids: Vec<&str>) -> Self
items.doc: Register ViewSlot ids — validated to match nav ids 1:1.

items.name: build
items.doc: Validate all composition rules. Returns sealed `AppDsl` or list of errors.
